name: memory
description: Memory, archive, and auto-compression system for long-term context management.

settings.label: Compression Threshold
settings.description: Trigger compression when context usage exceeds this ratio (0.0 - 1.0)

zh.label: 压缩触发阈值
zh.description: 当上下文使用量超过此比例时触发自动压缩 (0.0 - 1.0)

settings.label: Keep Recent Messages
settings.description: Number of recent messages to keep after compression

zh.label: 保留近期消息数
zh.description: 压缩后保留的最近消息数量

en.name: Memory
en.description: Memory, archive, and auto-compression for long-term context management.

zh.name: 记忆系统
zh.description: 记忆、存档归档与自动压缩，管理长期上下文。
